# kIOHIDElementCommitDirectionOut

**Enumeration Case**

Causes the element data to be sent to the device.

## Declaration

```swift
kIOHIDElementCommitDirectionOut
```

## Discussion

Specifying this direction causes the [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/commit] function to send the element data to the device. Use the [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/setValue] or [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/setDataValue] functions to specify the new data before committing it.

## Getting the Commit Directions

- **kIOHIDElementCommitDirectionIn**: Causes the retrieval of information from the device, and the populating of the element with the resulting data.
